name: library
description: Safely write validated memories, reusable skills, and durable context into a private GitHub-based AI context library shared across Claude Code, Claude web UI, and ChatGPT.

context_library_path.title: Context Library Path
context_library_path.description: Absolute path to the local AI context library (the ai-context-hub repo). Falls back to $AI_CONTEXT_LIBRARY_PATH or cwd.

default_agent_scope.title: Default Agent Scope
default_agent_scope.description: Default agent_scope tag written to new memories/skills. Default: *

default_source.title: Default Source
default_source.description: Default source attribution written to new memories. Default: claude-code

require_review.title: Require Review
require_review.description: Refuse to commit unless /library:review has been run. Default: true

allow_push.title: Allow Push
allow_push.description: Permit any push operations. Default: false. The plugin never pushes regardless.
